title: Single-Cell RNA-seq Analysis Workflow
author: Vannier Thomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This workflow performs a Snakemake pipeline to process 10x single-cell RNAseq data from fastq files to the analysis of the differential expression of marker-genes. Correction for technical differences between datasets can be included (i.e. batch effect correction) with the integration method during the sctransform process in Seurat to perform comparative scRNA-seq analysis across experimental conditions.
steps_raw: This workflow performs a Snakemake pipeline to process 10x single-cell RNAseq data from fastq files to the analysis of the differential expression of marker-genes. Correction for technical differences between datasets can be included (i.e. batch effect correction) with the integration method during the sctransform process in Seurat to perform comparative scRNA-seq analysis across experimental conditions.
